record_id.description: RecordID is the stable identifier of the evidence record.

kind.description: Kind is the evidence kind, always `publish` for this record family.

plan_path.description: PlanPath is the archived plan path associated with the record.

plan_stem.description: PlanStem is the durable plan stem associated with the record.

revision.description: Revision is the plan-local revision associated with the record.

recorded_at.description: RecordedAt is the record creation timestamp.

status.description: Status is the publish result status.

pr_url.description: PRURL is the pull request URL when one is available.

branch.description: Branch is the candidate branch name when one is available.

base.description: Base is the base branch name when one is available.

commit.description: Commit is the pushed commit SHA when one is available.

reason.description: Reason is the human-readable explanation attached to the evidence record.

EvidencePublishRecord.description: EvidencePublishRecord is the command-owned publish evidence artifact.
